    DefaultPasswordValidator.DEFAULT_ENTROPY_PROVIDER
    Calculates the entropy of the given PasswordData based on the password rules specified.

    Entropy provider.

    Classes in org.passay.entropy that implement Entropy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    RandomPasswordEntropy
    Entropy bits estimate defined in NIST SP-800-63-1 Randomly Selected Passwords.

    ShannonEntropy
    Entropy bits estimate defined in NIST SP-800-63-1 User Selected Passwords.
